colors: Primary color fill with 20% opacity gradient; line solid primary
accessibility: Add title + tooltip on hover; screen reader label
use_case: Trading price history account balance over time
avoid: Pie chart for time data — shows nothing useful

colors: Each bar brand primary; hover slightly darker; label on bar
accessibility: Use color + pattern for colorblind; include data labels
use_case: Revenue by category budget allocation product comparison
avoid: Donut chart for >5 items — labels overlap

colors: Each segment distinct hue; center shows total/label
accessibility: Avoid >6 segments; combine small as Other; legend beside
use_case: Market share portfolio allocation session volume by sector
avoid: Exploded pie charts — childish and confusing

colors: Series use blue/emerald/amber/violet family; consistent order
accessibility: Legend with color+pattern; alt text description
use_case: Quarter comparison year-over-year product line revenue

colors: Each series distinct vivid color; 2px stroke width
accessibility: 4+ series becomes unreadable — use small multiples
use_case: Multiple KPIs over time portfolio vs benchmark
avoid: More than 5 lines — unreadable spaghetti chart

colors: Green for positive amber for warning red for critical
accessibility: Always show exact number next to visual; label required
use_case: Goal completion budget used capacity utilization
avoid: Gauge charts for multi-value data — only works for single metric

colors: Sequential single hue — light=low dark=high; clear legend
accessibility: Title + legend + tooltip required; colorblind-safe palette
use_case: Regional sales delivery zones market penetration by region

colors: Dots in primary color; highlighted points in CTA color
accessibility: Labeled axes with units; tooltip with exact values
use_case: Price vs volume risk vs return feature correlation
avoid: Connecting scatter points with lines — implies sequence

colors: Single vivid line on dark mini chart; no axes needed
accessibility: Pause animation if prefers-reduced-motion; show last value
library: Recharts AreaChart tiny or Victory Sparkline
use_case: Price ticker order book depth dashboard KPI header
avoid: Full chart refresh every second — use incremental update

colors: Gradient from CTA color to lighter shade down funnel
accessibility: Label each stage with count and percentage
use_case: Sales pipeline conversion funnel onboarding steps
avoid: Vertical bar chart for funnel — loses funnel meaning visually

accessibility: Color scale legend required; hover tooltip with exact value
use_case: User activity calendar commit history trading volume by hour/day
avoid: Heatmap with >2 colors in scale — too complex to read
